svg.aria-label: Euler solver step sweep on a two-dimensional toy flow matching model
svg.text: Same learned field, different Euler step counts
Toy 2D diagnostic: black starts, blue trajectories, teal endpoints, vermillion target cloud
Metric drift is mean endpoint distance from a 128-step Euler reference on the same initial samples.
The comparison isolates integration step count; the trained field and random starts are held fixed.
